{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Sophara's Archlord weapon
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara possesses an [[Archlord weapon]] that can ignite.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
